summary: Completed testing of TYRELL flower shop new features: Hero without Flower Studio label, Services horizontal carousel with circular navigation buttons, Color Palette admin tab, Dynamic Sections admin tab, WhatsApp button positioning. All features working correctly.

issues: Product images showing alt text only - likely due to outdated image URLs in database, but layout structure is correct with horizontal carousel, titles, descriptions, and PEDIR buttons visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Hero section has no 'Flower Studio' label or decorative line, 2) Services section is horizontal carousel with circular < and > navigation buttons, 3) Admin panel has COLORES tab with full color palette editor, 4) Admin panel has SECCIONES tab for dynamic sections CRUD, 5) WhatsApp button positioned at bottom-8 right-6, 6) API endpoints /api/color-palette GET/PUT and /api/dynamic-sections CRUD all working, 7) colorPalette included in /api/content response

hero_no_flower_studio_label.details: Hero section content does not contain 'Flower Studio' label text. Verified by checking hero inner text.

hero_no_decorative_line.details: No decorative line elements (span.border-l) found in hero section.

services_horizontal_carousel.details: Services section displays products in horizontal scroll carousel with flex layout and overflow-x-auto.

services_circular_nav_buttons.details: Carousel has circular < and > navigation buttons. Left hidden on mobile (hidden lg:flex), right visible on all sizes.

services_swipeable_mobile.details: Carousel container has snap-x snap-mandatory classes and scrollbar-hide. Tested scroll from 16 to 192 pixels.

services_product_structure.details: Each product card has: image, title, description, PEDIR button (data-testid='product-order-btn-X'). 6 products displayed.

whatsapp_button_position.details: WhatsApp button has classes: fixed bottom-8 right-6 z-50 w-14 h-14 bg-[#25D366] rounded-full

admin_color_palette_tab.details: COLORES tab exists in admin panel and shows 'Paleta de Colores' editor with color swatches for primary, secondary, accent, text, background colors.

admin_dynamic_sections_tab.details: SECCIONES tab exists in admin panel and shows 'Secciones Dinámicas' manager with 'Nueva Sección' button. Form includes: section type dropdown, title, subtitle, content, image upload, button text/link, background/text colors.

api_color_palette_get.details: GET /api/color-palette returns palette with all 10 color fields: primary, primaryHover, secondary, accent, text, textLight, background, backgroundAlt, rose, nude

api_color_palette_put.details: PUT /api/color-palette successfully updates colors and returns updated palette.

api_dynamic_sections_crud.details: GET /api/dynamic-sections returns list, POST creates section with ID, PUT updates section, DELETE removes section.

api_content_includes_color_palette.details: /api/content response includes site.colorPalette with all color values.
